prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS Supercharger kit (80mm pulley, 6-7psi boost) paired with the 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6 (300hp stock), utilizing a custom HKS intercooler core (600x300x76mm) and Apexi Power Intake System with heat-shielded MAF housing for optimized airflow under forced conditions

Full bolt-on exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R (76mm dual outlets) with 304 stainless steel headers (equal-length 4-2-1 design) and a custom 3-inch mid-pipe featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust valve for backpressure control, paired with a GReddy Profec E01 electronic boost controller for precise supercharger mapping

Suspension overhaul with Tein EnduraPro Plus coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) featuring adjustable camber plates (Cusco Type RS) and polyurethane bushings (Whiteline W51910) for the rear multi-link setup, complemented by a TRD-sourced 24mm front sway bar and Cusco 22mm rear sway bar to mitigate body roll during aggressive lane changes
estetica: Liberty Walk LB0303 widebody conversion kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated LED DRLs, and rear diffuser) paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 rear spoiler (carbon fiber) for a 70mm overhang extension, finished in a custom matte PPG Toyota Super White II with 3M Gloss Black wrap accents on the roof and pillars

OEM+ interior upgrade with Bride Ergo XA seats (Alcantara/leather, 8-way power-adjustable) featuring Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm, suede) with a NRG quick-release hub, and a full Takata Drift II roll cage (6-point, bolt-in) for structural rigidity and motorsport aesthetics

Lighting and aero enhancements including a custom Hella Micro DE fog light kit (5000K, CREE XHP50 LEDs) integrated into the front bumper, a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type 2, 30% weight reduction) with functional heat extractors, and a custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (polyurethane, 3-fin design) paired with a set of Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (20x9.5 +35 front, 20x11 +40 rear) in Hyper Silver with Toyo R888R tires (255/35/20 front, 295/30/20 rear)
